q: What is the output of this Task code?
c:
var task = Task.Run(() => Console.WriteLine("Task"));
task.Wait();

q: The ______ keyword marks a method as asynchronous.
await pauses execution until the task completes.

c:
await Task.Delay(100);
Console.WriteLine("Done");
